name: grosharp/about-values
title: About Values
description: Three core values in a bold grid.

text.default: Not a list of buzzwords. The actual principles that shape how we work, who we work with, and what we ship.

value1Desc.default: We'd rather take the time to get it right than ship something that's just good enough. Every pixel, every line of code, every word earns its place — or it doesn't make it through.

value2Desc.default: We work best with clients who see us as long-term partners. We're invested in your outcomes — not just in delivering a file and moving on. Your growth is how we measure our own.

value3Desc.default: Every element on every page earns its place. We remove the noise so your message lands clearly. The best design is the kind visitors don't notice — they just feel at ease and convert.
